2029 Daniels Rd, Ellicott City, MD 21043, USA

Park section by the damn has a couple of Black walnut trees and a number of wineberrry bushes.

Surprisingly, not decimated by deer. Access: Public.
Patapsco Valley State Park - Daniels Road Trailhead, 2090 Daniels Rd, Ellicott City, MD 21043, USA

Park at the first parking lot at the Daniels area of Patapsco State Park, cross the stream to start on the hiking trail, and before the main path - along the river - are several silver berry trees. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
